title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 407.478 - Provisions of charitable organizations and solicitations law no bar to other civil actions
text:
407.478.  Provisions of charitable organizations and solicitations law no bar to other civil actions. — Nothing in sections 407.450 to 407.478 shall be construed to preclude any person or group of persons from asserting any private cause of action they might have against a charitable organization.
(L. 1986 S.B. 685) 
Effective 5-01-86
